overall.description: First-person gameplay footage showing a player walking along a sunny coastal beach area in a military simulation game. The player passes a yellow wooden building, approaches the water's edge, then turns to walk along the shoreline with scattered trees and open sandy terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal beach with scattered buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sandy beach toward a yellow coastal building

entered.detail: single-story yellow wooden structure with dark green roof and satellite dish
low grey concrete industrial building with multiple bays
calm blue sea meeting the horizon under clear sky
sparse low vegetation and small bushes on sandy ground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny coastal beach with a yellow wooden building ahead. The player walks forward on sandy terrain toward the building, with a concrete warehouse visible in the distance to the left and the ocean to the right. Sparse scrub vegetation dots the landscape.

events.description: player reaches the water's edge and turns left to walk parallel to the shoreline

agents.ego_description: approaching the ocean shoreline then turning to walk along the coast

entered.detail: small rocky formation visible on the horizon over the water
line of green leafy trees marking the inland edge of the beach

segments.scene_description: The player moves past the yellow building and approaches the water's edge, with the ocean expanding into view. At approximately 20 seconds, the player turns left to walk parallel to the shoreline. Coastal trees become visible on the left horizon while the ocean shifts from the right to ahead and then back to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal tree line with sandy beach

events.description: player briefly looks down at the sandy ground while continuing to walk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the coast with trees on the left and ocean on the right

entered.detail: rolling terrain with scattered buildings visible inland
rocky coastal formation extending into the water
prominent leafy tree with spreading branches casting shadows on the sand

segments.scene_description: The player continues walking along the coastline with the ocean now steadily on the right. The coastal trees on the left grow closer and more prominent, with one large tree passing by closely. The terrain remains sandy with scattered vegetation, and distant hills become visible inland. The player briefly glances down at the ground around the 28-second mark before continuing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey across a sunny coastal beach that shifts from a built environment toward a wilder, tree-lined shoreline. It begins with a walk across sandy terrain toward a yellow wooden building, with a concrete warehouse visible in the distance and the ocean stretching out to the right. As the camera moves past the building, the view opens up to the water's edge before turning left to follow the curve of the coast. The scene then expands as the player walks parallel to the ocean, with coastal trees emerging on the left horizon and growing more prominent. Finally, the camera passes a large tree and glances briefly at the sandy ground before continuing toward distant inland hills.
